title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have warned about AI systems entering early stages of self-improvement, with Claude handling code writing, review, debugging, and experiment execution at Anthropic. The commentary emphasizes that while humans set goals, AI is increasingly performing the technical work behind developing next-generation AI systems.
